productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Eqt Runbox Blue Sports Shoes
description: With a complete air mesh upper and non-marking rubber outsole, the adidas EQT Runbox ClimaCool shoe features 360 degrees of ventilation and absolute traction, making your workout sessions a pleasurable experience.UpperComplete mesh upper with ClimaCool technology for 360 degree cooling of the footSynthetic leather overlays for enhanced shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMeshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability and snug, comfortable FitMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised fitErgonomically curved and perforated footbed engineered with ClimaCool technology for all-day comfortMeshed below the footbed for better air flowOutsoleNon-marking gum rubber outsole with flex grooves for ease of movement and enhanced durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
